fields.title: Can Nap Filters
fields.description: Conditions that need to be met for the entity to nap.

fields.title: Wake Mob Exceptions
fields.description: Filters for mobs that will not wake this entity from napping.

fields.title: Cooldown Max
fields.description: Maximum time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the goal again

fields.title: Cooldown Min
fields.description: Minimum time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the goal again

fields.title: Mob Detect Dist
fields.description: The block distance in x and z that will be checked for mobs that this mob detects

fields.title: Mob Detect Height
fields.description: The block distance in y that will be checked for mobs that this mob detects

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

description: Allows mobs to occassionally stop and take a nap under certain conditions.
title: Nap Behavior
